components.text: The Ironwood Sprout has a beautiful Iron colored hue!

The Ironwood Sprout is a earth element aligned herb that gets its Iron looking hue from growing on stone containing traces of Iron

This herb fortifies bones!

It's possible to eat this raw but using this in a Pill Cauldron will reveal it's true capabilities!

Ironwood Sprout has a 7% chance of spawning on stone.

The Ironwood Sprout spawns in Stony Peaks biome.
This Herb is also one of the Common Herbs that can be found!
